steps.name: Clarify the Problem
steps.description: What is unacceptable vs. current — the gap between standard and actual.

fields.label: Ultimate Goal
fields.hint: The overarching outcome we are striving for.

fields.label: Standard
fields.hint: What SHOULD be happening (the target / expected condition).

fields.label: Current Situation
fields.hint: What IS happening right now (the observed condition).

fields.label: Gap = Problem
fields.hint: Standard minus Current — this is the problem statement.

fields.label: Chart
fields.hint: Visual showing the gap over time (actual vs target).

steps.name: Break Down the Problem
steps.description: What, where, when, who — narrow to the point of occurrence.

fields.label: Prioritized Problem at point of occurrence
fields.hint: The specific, localized sub-problem to solve (after stratification).

steps.name: Objective
steps.description: Do what, to what, by when — measurable.

fields.label: Do What
fields.hint: The action verb and subject.

fields.label: To What
fields.hint: The specific KPI or metric being improved.

fields.label: By When
fields.hint: Target date.

fields.label: Chart
fields.hint: Target line on the KPI trend.

steps.name: Root Cause
steps.description: At point of occurrence, fact-based — keep asking why. Fishbone / 6M method.

fields.label: Why 1
fields.hint: First why — directly observable.

fields.label: Why 2
fields.hint: Why did Why 1 happen?

fields.label: Why 3
fields.hint: Why did Why 2 happen?

fields.label: Why 4
fields.hint: Why did Why 3 happen?

fields.label: Why 5
fields.hint: Why did Why 4 happen? (root cause level)

fields.label: Fishbone / 6M Categories
fields.hint: Classify root cause: Man · Method · Machine · Material · Environment → Root Cause

fields.label: Root Cause
fields.hint: The single systemic root cause confirmed by the 5-Whys and 6M.

steps.name: Brainstorm Countermeasures
steps.description: List potential countermeasures to the root cause.

fields.label: Countermeasure Candidates
fields.hint: List all plausible countermeasures to the confirmed root cause. Prioritize next.

steps.name: Implement Selected Countermeasure
steps.description: Quickly implement & measure. Action register with R-Y-G-C status.

fields.label: Action Register
fields.hint: One row per countermeasure: No. | Implementation Plan | Start Date | Due Date | Responsible | Status (R=Behind / Y=At Risk / G=On Track / C=Completed). Up to 10 rows.

fields.label: Measurement — Start
fields.hint: Baseline actual when problem was confirmed.

fields.label: Measurement — End
fields.hint: Actual after implementing countermeasures.

fields.label: New Target
fields.hint: Revised target if countermeasure redefined the baseline.

fields.label: KPI
fields.hint: The KPI being tracked.

fields.label: Chart — Actual vs Target
fields.hint: Visual of the KPI trajectory before and after implementation.

steps.name: Standardize Successful Process
steps.description: Standardize, Yokoten — lock in the improvement and share it.

fields.label: Process Documents Created/Updated
fields.hint: List every BWI/SWI or SOP that was created or updated as a result. Link to the WMS SW Update Request ticket.

fields.label: Training on New Process(es)
fields.hint: Who was trained, and when.

fields.label: Yokoten Plan
fields.hint: How the improvement is communicated in-plant and to other plants (cross-pollination).

fields.label: Improvement Image or Chart
fields.hint: Before/after visual confirming the process change.
